water.name: Coon Creek
aliases: Coon Creek and tributaries east of Highway 65

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 221504, official name "Raccoon Creek" (Coon Creek), Stream, CA, Placer Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":221504,"gaz_name":"Raccoon Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","state_alpha":"CA"} — mouth point -121.5749, 38.8453 (confirmed independently via HomeTownLocator's GNIS-derived coordinate 38.8453124/-121.5748736); correcting the file's prior coordinate (-121.15, 38.87), a guessed point in the upper/eastern Placer Co. course, ~38km from the true mouth.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(29) — Coon Creek and tributaries (Placer Co.) east of Highway 65
sources.quotedText: (29) Coon Creek and tributaries (Placer Co.) east of Highway 65. Fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 15.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Applies to Coon Creek and tributaries (Placer Co.) east of Highway 65.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Fourth Saturday in May through October 15, on Coon Creek and tributaries east of Highway 65
regulations.verbatimText: Coon Creek and tributaries (Placer Co.) east of Highway 65. Fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 15.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead (adipose-fin-clipped, denoted ** in the regulations) daily bag limit; 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily; 4 in possession
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
